title: Faster Performance
description: A modpack that aims to imrpove the performance.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8f23d15c338aea040461ee5ea677917cef81bfe_0.webp)

This is a modpack that aims to find the <ins>best performance and fix mods to achieve the maximum fps and improving your gameplay without reducing your performance. It also has the best options for the best performance.</ins>

This modpack only contains the best performance mods, these mods are also <ins>usually</ins> compatible with any performance mod you want to add by yourself.

<details>
<summary>Included Mods (18)</summary>
  
- **[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)**: Powerful rendering engine and optimization mod for Minecraft which greatly improves performance and graphical quality. By **[jellysquid3](https://modrinth.com/user/jellysquid3)**
  
- **[Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)**: General-purpose optimization mod for Minecraft which works to improve a number of systems with the goal of not changing any vanilla mechanics. By **[jellysquid3](https://modrinth.com/user/jellysquid3)**
  
- **[BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations)**: A collection of mostly micro optimizations that add up to something bigger! By **[thosea](https://modrinth.com/user/thosea)**

- **[Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)**: Using async path-tracing to skip rendering Block/Entities that are not visible. By **[tr7zw](https://modrinth.com/user/tr7zw)**
  
- **[Clean F3](https://modrinth.com/mod/clean-f3)**: Removes uselles information from the debug menu to increase the performance. By **[tyrannus](https://modrinth.com/user/tyrannus)**
  
- **[FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)**: Reduces the memory usage of Minecraft. By **[malte0811](https://modrinth.com/user/malte0811)**

- **[ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)**: Generally optimizes all immediate mode rendering by using a custom buffer implementation which batches draw calls and uploads data to the GPU in a more efficient way. By **[RaphiMC](https://modrinth.com/user/RaphiMC)**

- **[Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)**: Reduce resource usage while Minecraft is in the background or idle and also remove the menu cap limit. By **[juliand665](https://modrinth.com/user/juliand665)**

- **[No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports)**: Strips cryptographic signatures which are attached to every chat message sent. Removing them makes it impossible to track and associate your chat messages with your Minecraft client, and, by extension, Microsoft account. By **[Aizistral](https://modrinth.com/user/Aizistral)**

- **[MoreCulling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling)**: Changes how multiple types of culling are handled in order to improve performance. By **[FX](https://modrinth.com/user/FX)**

- **[Very Many Players (VMP)](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric)**: Improves performance at high playercounts. By **[Ishland](https://modrinth.com/user/ishland)**

- **[ThreadTweak](https://modrinth.com/mod/threadtweak)**: Improves and tweak Minecraft CPU scheduling. By **[getchoo](https://modrinth.com/user/getchoo)**

- **[Noisium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisium)**: Optimises worldgen performance for a better gameplay experience. By **[Steveplays](https://modrinth.com/user/Steveplays)**

- **[Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe)**: Reduce block entity FPS lag with almost no compromises. By **[FoundationGames](https://modrinth.com/user/FoundationGames)**

- [**Language Reload**](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload): Reduces load times and adds fallbacks for languages while also automaticly selecting your system's language for you. By **[Jerozgen](https://modrinth.com/user/Jerozgen)**

- **[Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)**: Adds OptiFine's extra options to Sodium and other performance options that are not avabile on Sodium. By **[FlashyReese](https://modrinth.com/user/FlashyReese)**
  
- **[Modern Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix)**: Improves performance, reduces memory usage, and fixes many bugs. By **[embeddedt](https://modrinth.com/user/embeddedt)**

- **[Phosphor](https://modrinth.com/mod/phosphor)**: Optimizes the lighthining engine of the game. <ins>**(Only included in Minecraft 1.19 and older versions of the modpack)**</ins>. By **[jellysquid3](https://modrinth.com/user/jellysquid3)**
</details>


<details>
<summary>Other NetherTeam Modpacks</summary>
  
- **[Bedrock Edition: Renew](https://modrinth.com/project/bedrock-edition-modpack):** Adds bedrock menus and features to Java basically porting Bedrock to Java.

- **[Bedrock Edition: Legacy](https://modrinth.com/project/bedrock-edition):** Old version of Bedrock Edition: Renew that only has main bedrock features.

- **[Vanilla IRL](https://modrinth.com/modpack/vanillairl):** A Vanilla+ modpack thats realistic but enough to keep the Vanilla feel.

- **[Faster Quality](https://modrinth.com/project/faster-quality)**: Faster Quality is a modpack that boosts your performance, improves your visual and quality a lot, and add quality of life improvements to make your game playable and more enjoyable while trying not to reduce your performance! (The Fancy version of this modpack)


**See all at the [NetherTeam](https://mcnetherteam.github.io/modpacks) official website.**
</details>
